iteration_1_baseline.notes: Original verbose skill with OOXML editing, redlining, etc. Baseline scores perfect but skill very large.

iteration_2_trimmed.notes: Aggressively trimmed SKILL.md. docx-extract dropped due to model using pandoc plain text for table parsing (unreliable). docx-create had partial content match failure.

iteration_3_optimized.notes: Added python-docx table extraction guidance and complete extraction pattern. Both tasks back to 100/100.

changes: Removed OOXML editing workflow, redlining workflow, tracked changes content (not needed for tasks)
Removed ooxml.md, ooxml/ directory (schemas, scripts), scripts/ directory (document.py, utilities.py, templates), LICENSE.txt
Added python-docx table extraction guidance with complete code pattern for structured data extraction
Added numeric string conversion guidance (remove $, commas, convert to proper types)
Kept docx-js.md reference for document creation
Reduced SKILL.md from ~200 lines to ~100 lines, focusing on creation and extraction workflows
